pi_items.source: Task description and python script fetching 2PTN from RCSB PDB showing it corresponds to bovine trypsin.
Checked export_result.sh and verifier.py which explicitly test for the figure at this path.
Checked export_result.sh and verifier.py which explicitly test for the report at this path.
export_result.sh writes to this file and verifier.py reads from it.
verifier.py checks if the generated PNG is >= 30000 bytes.
verifier.py enforces a minimum distance of 2.0 Å in the report.
verifier.py enforces a maximum distance of 4.5 Å in the report.
Python script parsing PDB 2PTN confirming His, Asp, Ser at these sequence positions, representing the canonical catalytic triad. Also explicitly checked by verifier.py regex.
verifier.py enforces a minimum of 5 lines in the report.
verifier.py enforces a minimum of 100 characters in the report.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for pymol_env trypsin_catalytic_triad_analysis task. Verified that real protein structure data for PDB 2PTN (bovine trypsin) is used by fetching it directly from RCSB PDB and confirming that sequence positions 57, 102, and 195 correspond to the Histidine, Aspartate, and Serine catalytic triad, matching the task instructions and verifier logic. Additionally, verified all explicit file paths and verifier thresholds.
